name: National Energy Services Reunited Corp.
business: National Energy Services Reunited Corp. provides oilfield services to oil and natural gas companies, primarily in the Middle East and North Africa region. Its services include production services such as hydraulic fracturing, coiled tubing, stimulation and pumping, cementing, nitrogen services, filtration services, pipelines and industrial services, production assurance, artificial lift services, completions and integrated production management, as well as drilling and evaluation services such as rigs, fishing and downhole tools, thru-tubing intervention, tubular running services, directional drilling, drilling and completion fluids, pressure control, well testing services, wireline logging services, and slickline services.

exposures.sentence: The Company's business consists primarily of upstream and midstream oilfield services with oil and natural gas companies as customers.
